# zstack_price_table (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage price tables in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the price table.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the price table.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the price table.
